header.location: Salt Lake City, UT (Open to Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, detail-driven (97% extrovert!) Operations & Analytics professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, building processes grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to dig into the data, surface what others miss, and improve the controls and workflows around it.
